headline: SDG&E, Qualcomm and UC San Diego Launch Edge AI Collaboration to Advance Wildfire and Extreme-Weather Response
summary: San Diego Gas & Electric (SDG&E), a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE:SRE), Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. and the University of California San Diego's Scripps Institution of Oceanography today announced Edge Alert Sentinel (EAS), a new collaboration that will bring artificial intelligence (AI) directly to the front lines of wildfire and extreme-weather response. Designed to detect and analyze rapidly changing conditions in real time, the initiative represents a new approach to environmental intelligence

Designed to detect and analyze rapidly changing conditions in real time, the initiative represents a new approach to environmental intelligence

headline: Got $25,000? Broadcom or Qualcomm: The Clear Winner for Growth Investors This Year
summary: Broadcom (NASDAQ:AVGO) and Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) just gave investors two different reads on the AI chip economy. Broadcom posted a record quarter driven by custom AI silicon for hyperscalers. Qualcomm beat estimates while nursing a handset slump, leaning on automotive growth and a fresh data center engagement. Both stocks fell last week, making the $25,000 question ... Got $25,000? Broadcom or Qualcomm: The Clear Winner for Growth Investors This Year

headline: Kodamai Names AI and Semiconductor Veteran Pankaj Kedia Non-Executive Director as Agentic AI Expands Beyond the Cloud
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & GLASGOW, Scotland, June 08, 2026--Kodamai, a pioneer in mathematically rigorous agentic AI, today announced the appointment of Pankaj Kedia as Non-Executive Director on its Board of Directors. The appointment brings Kedia’s deep AI and semiconductor expertise to Kodamai at a pivotal moment in the company’s evolution, as enterprises accelerate their adoption of agentic AI while shifting away from centralized cloud toward heterogeneous, distributed compute environments spanning clo
